FeatureName: Deterministic winner selection and rejection moves
Description: Choose one best survivor from each duplicate set using deterministic local rules and move duplicate losers into the day-level `rejected` folder.

Stories.StoryDescription: Pick one survivor per duplicate set using blur score descending, then capture time ascending, then lexical path order as a deterministic tie-break.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Each duplicate set keeps exactly one deterministic winner without AI involvement.

Stories.StoryDescription: Move all rejected duplicate photos into `dayXX/rejected` using the existing safe file-move behavior and collision handling.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Duplicate losers are moved into the correct `rejected` folder without deleting files.

Stories.StoryName: Handle clusters that collapse to one photo
Stories.StoryDescription: Keep cleanup stable when duplicate rejection leaves a cluster with only one surviving photo.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Clusters that collapse to a single survivor continue through cleanup and are covered by automated tests.
